duration_rule.closed_incidents: calendar days from open_date to close_date
duration_rule.open_incidents: calendar days from open_date to analysis_date

percentage_rule.incident_percentage_denominator: all incidents in the filtered full-year population
percentage_rule.cost_percentage_denominator: total resolution_cost for all incidents in the filtered full-year population

supplier_ranking_order: incident_count descending, then total_resolution_cost descending, then supplier_id ascending

codes.PROCUREMENT_FREEZE: Use when the supplier quality_status is quality_hold and the supplier has at least 5 filtered RMAs, at least 1 critical filtered RMA, or at least 30000.00 total filtered resolution cost.
codes.SUPPLIER_ESCALATION: Use when the supplier has at least 1 critical filtered RMA, or has at least 8 filtered RMAs, more filtered RMAs than filtered work orders, and at least 65000.00 total filtered resolution cost.
codes.WAREHOUSE_PROCESS_REVIEW: Use when filtered WORK_ORDER incidents are at least 10 and are greater than or equal to filtered RMA incidents.
codes.WATCHLIST: Use when supplier quality_status is watch or quality_hold, filtered incident_count is at least 8, total filtered resolution cost is at least 30000.00, or severe_incident_count is at least 3.
codes.MONITOR: Use when none of the higher-precedence conditions apply.
